PARANOIA sioess ly 
(adapted from an article published in Dragon magazine, February, 1986) 
The following excerpts from the infamous manuscript Treasonous Jive That'll Keep You Alive” are presented by the inspired leader- ship of PURGE ("Smash The Computer PURGE is your friend”) to help Trouble- shooters survive mission assignments This information is of most use to exper Jenced Troubleshooters, who have undergone, if not survived, several Paranoia expeditions, and understand the kind of snafus, insanity and, ‘general mayhem that can be expected, Don't fee! compelled to read it the fist time you pay. These maxims were allegedly collected and annotated by the folk hero “One Clone Char "The volume of this manuscript (over 600 ‘handwritten pages in tiny script) attests to the author's longevity and therefore the presumed lilly of his advice, 
I Never Saw a Boot | Couldn't Lick 
Or a bot sensor. Or a Computer terminal Indeed, licking the metaphorical boots of The Computer is the primary survival skill.
